inputs.label: Current Loan Balance
inputs.businessContext: Remaining principal balance on the existing mortgage.

inputs.label: Current Interest Rate (Annual %)
inputs.businessContext: Annual interest rate of the existing mortgage.

inputs.label: Remaining Loan Term
inputs.businessContext: Number of months left on the existing mortgage.

inputs.label: New Interest Rate (Annual %)
inputs.businessContext: Annual interest rate of the new refinance loan.

inputs.label: New Loan Term
inputs.businessContext: Term of the new refinance loan in months.

inputs.label: Closing Costs
inputs.businessContext: Upfront fees and costs associated with refinancing, not financed.

formulas.currentMonthlyPayment: currentBalance * (currentRate/1200 * Math.pow(1 + currentRate/1200, currentTermRemaining)) / (Math.pow(1 + currentRate/1200, currentTermRemaining) - 1)
formulas.newMonthlyPayment: currentBalance * (newRate/1200 * Math.pow(1 + newRate/1200, newTerm)) / (Math.pow(1 + newRate/1200, newTerm) - 1)
